description: Maroon 95% combed cotton and 5% elastane sleeveless innerwear vest with a round neck and signature Levi's tag at the hem and at the nape Wash care Machine wash cold Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron as needed Do not dry clean If you need a basic vest to keep you feeling fresh under your shirt and provide a little warmth when the air conditioning gets too cold then you've found it here. Levi's know what they're doing when they come up with practical basics which will make you look and feel great. The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
